top_signals.title: Aqua superPower, Tidal Transit Partner on Electric CTVs
top_signals.summary: Aqua superPower and Tidal Transit have formed a strategic partnership to support the deployment of electric crew transfer vessels (E-CTVs) for ports and harbors serving offshore infrastructure, including offshore wind projects.Under the agreement…
